task_name: add model rename API endpoint and CLI command

details.reasoning: All rubric requirements are fully implemented: (1) RenameRequest struct in api/types.go with properly json-tagged Source and Destination fields; (2) Client.Rename method in api/client.go POSTs to /api/rename with RenameRequest; (3) Server RenameHandler in server/routes.go with RenameModel implementation that copies then deletes source, returns 404 on os.ErrNotExist and 409 on os.ErrExist; (4) Route r.POST("/api/rename", s.RenameHandler) registered; (5) CLI command "rename SOURCE DESTINATION" with cobra.ExactArgs(2) added to both command lists; (6) CLI RenameHandler creates client, calls client.Rename with args, prints success message; (7) No existing test files modified, only new functionality added. Implementation follows existing code patterns and error handling conventions.
